libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No special environment or system properties are required. Generate tests against supported Pekko 2.0.0-M1 APIs such as ActorSystem, Props, AbstractActor, serialization/config APIs, and avoid org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, and TypedProps.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 1.1.5 tests reference TypedActor classes that are absent from the 2.0.0-M1 artifact, so carrying those tests forward will keep failing compilation.
Pekko documentation commonly shows pekko-testkit for actor unit testing, but it is not required to exercise the core pekko-actor artifact meaningfully.
Java serialization tests may need in-test Typesafe Config enabling pekko.actor.allow-java-serialization, but this is test code configuration rather than deterministic workflow setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed before meaningful Pekko Actor coverage is reachable; the observed failure is from tests using deprecated TypedActor APIs removed in Pekko 2.0.0-M1.
